channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed

item.title: Coles Abandons $4 Billion Pet Business Acquisition Due to Valuation Concerns
item.description: Coles has abandoned its $4 billion bid to acquire Greencross, the owner of Petbarn and City Farmer, citing concerns over the valuation. The decision comes after shareholder pressure to preserve capita...

item.title: Ukraine-Russia Conflict Escalates with Major Missile Attacks and Oil Infrastructure Strikes
item.description: Ukrainian forces have struck three oil depots and a fuel facility in Russia's southern Stavropol region, according to President Volodymyr Zelensky. The attack follows a major Russian aerial assault on...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Builds Pizza Empire After Leaving Bank Job, Mother Now Supports Her Venture
item.description: A Nairobi woman left a stable bank job to start a pizza business, a decision that left her mother deeply unconvinced at the time. Nine years after launching Crafted Pizza, the business now runs severa...

item.title: Kylian Mbappe Becomes World Cup's Top Scorer with Second Golden Boot Win
item.description: Kylian Mbappe has cemented his legacy as the all-time leading scorer in FIFA World Cup history after claiming his second Golden Boot title. The 27-year-old French forward scored 10 goals in the 2026 t...

item.title: FIFA Introduces Championship Rings for 2026 World Cup Winners with Luxury Cost Details
item.description: FIFA has introduced championship-style rings for the first time in World Cup history, awarding them to Spain as the 2026 winners. Each ring, made from 18-karat gold and adorned with 89 diamonds and 36...

item.title: Internet shutdown in Jammu and Kashmir's Doda following police firing incident

item.title: Kylian Mbappé surpasses Lionel Messi's World Cup goal record
item.description: Kylian Mbappé of France surpassed Lionel Messi's long-standing record for most career goals in a single World Cup tournament by scoring his 21st and 22nd goals during France's 6-4 third-place playoff ...
